# Pull Request Review Checklist

## Summary

Describe the operating-system, agent, template, schema, dashboard, or workflow change.

## Change Type

- [ ] New agent instruction
- [ ] Agent instruction update
- [ ] Opportunity intake template
- [ ] Pricing / compliance / proposal template
- [ ] Dashboard / KPI update
- [ ] Data schema update
- [ ] GitHub issue template update
- [ ] Other documentation update

## Required Review

- [ ] Command Agent review
- [ ] Product Fit review if product claims changed
- [ ] Pricing review if pricing logic changed
- [ ] Compliance / Risk review if compliance language changed
- [ ] Executive review if approval thresholds changed

## Risk Check

- [ ] No secrets included
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Reviewed for correctness
- [ ] No unsupported technical claims added
- [ ] No unapproved pricing language added
- [ ] No legal commitment language added without review
- [ ] No domestic-content representation added without compliance review
- [ ] No submission process gap introduced

## Deployment Notes

- Activation date:
- Owner:
- Rollback plan:
